name: AFM Small Model Helper
description: Deterministic scaffolding for Apple Foundation Models: size and decompose tasks, rank compact context, compile constrained prompts, repair JSON, and validate model output.

tools.name: analyze_task
tools.description: Estimate task/context size and recommend single-pass vs decomposed execution for a small on-device model.

context.description: Optional context that may accompany the task.

max_context_tokens.description: Working context budget used for routing. Default 1800.

tools.name: decompose_task
tools.description: Break a compound instruction into a short ordered plan that an on-device model can execute step by step.

tools.name: compile_prompt
tools.description: Compile a compact AFM-friendly prompt with explicit role, task, context, constraints, output contract, and final self-check.

task.description: The exact job the model must perform.

constraints.description: Comma, semicolon, newline, or JSON-list constraints.

output_schema.description: Optional JSON schema or example. When supplied, the prompt requests JSON only.

tools.name: build_context
tools.description: Rank and select locally supplied document chunks by keyword overlap so AFM receives the smallest relevant context packet.

query.description: Question or task used to rank chunks.

documents.description: Local text to split and rank. Separate natural chunks with blank lines.

tools.name: repair_json
tools.description: Extract and deterministically repair common small-model JSON defects such as code fences, trailing commas, and Python literals.

text.description: Raw model output expected to contain JSON.

tools.name: validate_output
tools.description: Validate output length, JSON parseability, and required fields before Switchbay trusts or forwards an AFM result.

required_keys.description: Optional required keys as CSV, newline list, or JSON list.

expect_json.description: Whether valid JSON is required. Default false.
